review_title: Everything we expected and so much more
description: The few "problems" we did have we were able to work with the supprt team or our salesman Henrique and they were resolved. The support team is awesome, very knowledgeable and fast to respond. Even when we created our own problems they were willing to step and and correct our mistake in a very fast time frame. We looked at several other products and are so glad we decided to go with Teamgram, everyone loves it. Thank you Henrique and the entire Teamgram support team.
author: Brian S.
pros: We work in a very challenging industry with many vendor and part numbers. The ease of uploading and updating price lists has been a huge advantage of software we prevously used. Also the team aspect of Teamgram is a great help for our sales team, everyone is on the same page and know what everyone else is working on. The shared information, contacts, quotes, sales etc is a great tool that helps everyone from sales to service to parts.
cons: This is a hard one to answer as most of the problems we encountered were self inflicted and caused by us. The few "problems" we did have the support team and our salesperson worked with us and resolved or discovered a work around. We really don't have anything to say we liked the least.

review_title: Good tool for your money
description: Teamgram is a gem among the CRMs out there. It is cheap, sleek, extremely intuitive, and easy to use for anyone with non or tons of CRM experience.
author: Henrique C.
pros: It is inexpensive; it has great pre-canned features that you would pay a premium price in other larger tools. I use it for my personal business, which helps me manage my leads, customer interactions, opportunities, and forecasting. It has an awesome built-in proposal builder that saves me time when preparing proposals for my customers.
cons: They could do something better about support, but everything comes with a price. Some of the features are over the top and could be simplified for a better customer experience.

review_title: Overall Very Useful Tool
author: Kelley L.
pros: I like all that it can do and find it useful with a sales team spread between 3 cities. The software is able to follow a project lead all the way through shipment of the product. The fact that it is cloud-based is a huge feature. The mobile app is excellent even though several of the features are not enabled and the screen looks different in the mobile format.
cons: It does not seem to be stable since I have several times had it crash multiple times through active use. I wish that the threads or parts of the projects were easier to tie together no matter what screen you are in. There is no feature to auto-fill the cells even though some information is often repeated. I wish it had this feature. The duplication of the information is a time stinks.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Why we selected TeamGram as our CRM tool?
description: TeamGram has a very responsive and resourceful team that is fully committed to support our on-boarding. The tool is self-serving. Min training is required.
author: Murat G.
pros: We're a small organization operating globally with regional offices in Toronto, Delaware, Dubai and Istanbul. We're searching for a CRM tool that is not cumbersome to implement and that we can operate globally with min overhead. After being introduced to TeamGram, we're up and running in less than 48 hours. TeamGram is a streamlined product that comes with intuitive and user-friendly UI. If you want agility and speed, do not have IT resources, TeamGram is the right tool.
cons: At this moment, I do not have any negative comments.

review_title: I strongly recommend Teamgram, we are very happy with it.
author: Günhan K.
pros: Very user friendly tool. Major positives, it's cloud based. We can use Teamgram from virtually anywhere with the mobile app.
cons: No major negatives to mention so far. It would be nice to have some more customization options available.

review_title: Very happy with Teamgram. Strongly recommended.
author: Nedret B.
pros: Teamgram is easy to use with lots of features at an affordable price. Beautiful and very user friendly inteface.
cons: No complaints or negatives. We are really happy to use Teamgram. Great, friendly support. Nice features.

review_title: Good all-around CRM that does everything
author: Ozan Ozgur E.
pros: It's a very well-rounded system at an affordable price. We love using it to build quote templates and send them out. Teamgram makes customer follow up easy, and their customer support team is very helpful too
cons: Adding more email features for quotes and templates would make a welcome addition to our work flow.

review_title: Best bang for your buck CRM
author: Alper S.
pros: It's cheap, it's easy, and it gets the job done. We got rid of the last CRM because the interface was too complex and confusing, and the team had adoption issues. Lowest price performance ratio.
cons: Learning curve seemed a little bit steep for some of our team members. They were overwhelmed by all the features, especially the ones we didn't use. After we figure out how to deactivate sections we didn't need, it became faster for us to adapt.

review_title: Lots of customizations!
author: Merden K.
pros: We like being able to customize the interface and make it our own. Also, the custom applications section has a lot of neat features that we've started using recently too.
cons: It's again about customizations. Not a big issue, but you need to spend some time in the Control Panel to find out where everything is.

review_title: Amazingly easy!! We just started using Teamgram and we are so happy with it. It is so easy to use.
author: Tanya A.
pros: -Amazing customer service and support. -Very easy to use and set up. -Extremely easy customization for our needs. -We love that it's local and billed in Canadian Dollars. -Excellent value for the money!! Best price compared to competitors! -Sales and customer support answered ALL of our questions, were on top of everything and even helped us with set up! They are always polite and follow up with us regularly.
cons: We have no complaints. We like everything about the program and wouldn't change anything. It's clean and easy to navigate.
author_profession: Manager of Operations and Business Development
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Team Gram
author: Amanda H.
pros: This software is very organized and able to really allow the user to format and organize their activities they way they want. You can prioritize what needs to be done first, and what are secondary activities that need to be done and color-coordinate activities based on what you want.
cons: I have no cons. This website is easy to use and has a lot of great features.

review_title: A simple and good tool for client Management
author: Uddhav T.
pros: The platform is easy to use, I am Mutual Fund Distributor and using the platform client management and service to clients.
cons: Not applicable least or best, as total software is useful

review_title: We know that our information is in safe hands.
description: I feel everything is in my hand with teamgram. During long business trips teamgram helps me to keep in touch with my company and know anything about what happens. we try several CRm programs, but we are sure that teamgram is the final stop for us. They are not giving us best service, but also improve and update application al the time.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: We didn't realize how much effect TeamGram was making to our business until we looked at our yearly results. We use TeamGram with maximum performance.
cons: No major cons, but I hope they add more department and company reporting details and a better looking reporting dashboard.

review_title: Perfect for small teams
description: We have been using it for several years and it is very heavily utilized the help us stay organized. We are not a sales team so don't utilize all of the features but the ones we do use are very helpful.
author: Andrea M.
pros: This software is a lifesaver for our small team. We list tasks and can assign just ourselves or add anyone who may be able to help. We utilize a team approach so several people may be working on the same thing. Being able to write notes on tasks and the bar showing how complete the task is are also very helpful. We also try very hard to enter contacts so that everyone doesn't just hoard their own.
cons: Adding contacts is a little tedious. I have an app on my phone that takes a picture of a business card and filters all of the info into neat little categories. With TeamGram I have to first create a company then add a contact. We also tried the Incoming Calls feature for awhile and decided it wasn't a good fit for us because it required that everyone check the tab regularly. It would be more helpful to have an alert that a call came in. Instead, we reverted back to IM.

review_title: The To - Do List
description: It has helped us stream line our productivity to ensure nothing accidentally falls in the cracks.
author: Sophie R.
pros: We have been using this software as a company for several years now to help organize tasks that need to be done, share contact information, and keep track of phone messages. As a team we jokingly refer to it as the "to do list." As a supervisor I feel good knowing I can communicate the need of which tasks need to get done, and what the priority is all in one central place. Additionally, I like knowing when I get assigned to tasks, that it is something that needs to get done to help the team.
cons: I don't like that you can't prioritize or tag individuals in phone messages, so that they can get an alert. It is tedious to check that tab regularly to make sure no calls are missed.

review_title: The most interactive software for doing customer follow up.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Teamgram has given us a very important advantage for our company. It is very easy to store the records of our customers' data and service provided, and even easier to access it.
cons: Lead management could be better if they added more features like filtering our junk leads and being able to pull more lead information from the web

review_title: I love TeamGram, it really helps our team stay organized which helps us better serve our consumers.
description: Our team stays more organized and on task. I feel that we pay better attention to the tasks at hand and are able to stay focused on our team approach and our mission of serving our consumers/community. I am certain that if a task is put on our team to do list, it won't fall through the cracks.
author: Sophie R.
pros: This software allows all parties to assign tasks, create memos, and record missed messages which really helps our small company focus on a team approach. By utilizing the team approach, we have been able to make our daily operations more efficient and use that saved time networking for our consumers.
cons: I don't have any negative feedback to offer. I think that the software fits the specific needs of the company.

review_title: TeamGram is a very powerful tool for every sales organisation.
description: We manage our sales organisation and easily followup customers. Wherever we are, we reach all customer data in one place.
author: Can Bulent B.
pros: We are using TeamGram for sales management. Our sales cycle is so long so we should follow-up customer's each step and shouldn't forget what we have been speaking and what happened, what are they thinking etc. Quotes are so important for us as well. TeamGram gives us to do all things in one place. Very easy to use so sales team easily adapt to use it. TeamGram is a very powerful tool for every sales organisation.
cons: Actually, we don't have special requirements but we know that this is not a final product. They are adding new features nearly every day.

review_title: It's good so far
author: Murat Ç.
pros: Easy to use, excellent support. Tested as a trial user. Could not proceed yet due to our long decision making process.
cons: Task management functions lack the complexity needed for managing our projects. Although we managed ways to reflect our internal workflows, I think there's room for improvement in task management.

review_title: Teamgram offers an almost limitless solution to your problems.
author: Seyfi Ü.
pros: It's very easy to prepare proposals. You can easily follow up your customers. Teamgram sales and support team's are very professional, patient, and supportive.
cons: Salesperson based sales target definition feature. It's very easy to prepare proposals. You can easily follow up your customers. Teamgram sales and support team's are very professional, patient, and supportive.

review_title: Better than expected for email marketing
author: Haluk K.
pros: Really like the Mailchimp integration. Helps us manage our sales process. A lot of our customers come from our website, in-store, and education fairs, and it saves us time managing it all in TeamGram. Also I really enjoy how the platform lets you add special dates to every contact - we use it for birthdays and sales reminders.
cons: It would be awesome if they could add marketing automation features and more list options to the platform.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great support team...
author: Ozan T.
pros: Needed help with setting up - the support team at Teamgam went above and beyond helping us out. Our quotes are now formatted beautifully and tracked properly. Our sales team also enjoys using the mobile app
cons: The reporting feature is OK so far. More detailed sales reports and dashboards would be nice to have.

review_title: TeamGram Review
description: My experience with TeamGram has been pretty good. I only use it seldomly though.
author: Michael Y.
pros: I love the ease of posting and completing a task.
cons: The website is pretty simple and easy to use without much difficulty. I would like more features where we can customize the website.

review_title: Great data holder for out company
description: Overally easy to use and it is helping our company to keep datas in a place that everyone can reach.
author: Berke K.
pros: Our company have been using Teamgram for years. Almost having all our internal data sharing thru it. Easy tı use and easy to monitor.
cons: I mostly use it to fill out my annual leave notifications and montly checking the updates on certain suppliers. So from the parts i use i feel fine and dont have a bad thing to say .

review_title: TeamGram is great for better productivity. Thanks for the effort.
author: Yijit Oguz D.
pros: The reminders and notifications provide me with the biggest boost in productivity. Helped me build better relationships with my customers and I finally got to retire using Excel.
cons: No major complaints so far. It does what it promises. Great support when you need help. Better dashboard visuals would be nice to have.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
